headline: A Look At Church & Dwight (CHD) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Moves
summary: Church & Dwight stock snapshot after recent price moves Recent trading in Church & Dwight (CHD) has drawn attention after a 0.8% one day decline, a 2.8% gain over the past week, and mixed returns over the month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Church & Dwight. At a share price of US$95.42, Church & Dwight combines a 15.5% year to date share price return with a 1 year total shareholder return of 7.4% decline, suggesting near term momentum has picked up while longer term returns...
